messageCosts.title: Important: WhatsApp Message Costs
messageCosts.description: Meta/WhatsApp conversation pricing is billed separately by Meta based on Meta's pricing model.
messageCosts.noCharge: WhachatCRM does not add per-message markups.
messageCosts.planControls: Your plan only controls how many conversations you manage inside the CRM.
messageCosts.transparent: This keeps pricing transparent and predictable.

activeConversation.title: What Is an "Active Conversation"?
activeConversation.point1: One unique WhatsApp contact within a rolling 30-day window
activeConversation.point2: Unlimited messages can happen inside that conversation — the count stays the same

reachLimit.title: What Happens When I Reach My Limit?
reachLimit.upgradePrompt: You'll see a clear upgrade prompt

payTwice.q: Do I pay twice — once to my provider and once to WhachatCRM?
payTwice.a1: No. You're paying for two different things:
payTwice.providerDesc: Conversation fees based on Meta's pricing model
payTwice.whachatDesc: Managing conversations, teams, notes, tasks & workflows
payTwice.analogy: Think of it like email: Gmail sends emails, CRM manages customers.

noMessageFees.q: Why don't your plans include WhatsApp message fees?
noMessageFees.a2: By letting customers connect their own provider:
noMessageFees.standard: This is the standard SaaS model.

channels.a1: WhachatCRM supports 7 messaging channels in one unified inbox:
channels.tiktok: Lead intake only (capture leads from TikTok ads)
channels.note: Note: SMS requires Twilio. Meta only supports WhatsApp, not SMS.

providers.q: Which WhatsApp providers do you support?
providers.a1: WhachatCRM guides WhatsApp setup through Meta Embedded Signup.
providers.twilio: Legacy Twilio connections may still be available for existing setups.
providers.meta: Meta Embedded Signup guides you through selecting your business, WhatsApp account, and phone number.
providers.a2: We verify the connection automatically after Meta returns you to WhachatCRM.
providers.note: The WhatsApp Business mobile app is not supported.

twilioVsMeta.twilio1: Use the correct Facebook/Meta admin account
twilioVsMeta.twilio2: Make sure your business and WhatsApp assets are ready in Meta
twilioVsMeta.twilio3: Some Meta features may require approval before live customer messaging works
twilioVsMeta.meta4: Choose the phone number to connect

otherProviders.q: Do you support other WhatsApp providers?
otherProviders.a1: WhatsApp setup is guided through Meta Embedded Signup. Legacy Twilio-based setups may remain available where already enabled.
otherProviders.a2: We're collecting demand for additional providers like:
otherProviders.contact: Contact us to help shape future integrations.

upgradeDowngrade.q: Can I upgrade or downgrade anytime?
upgradeDowngrade.a: Yes. Plans are monthly, flexible, and update instantly.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need WhatsApp Business API?
faq.a1: Yes, but you don't need to set it up yourself. Our concierge team handles the entire WABA registration and Meta Business Manager verification as part of the one-time template license fee.
faq.q2: Can I use my existing phone number?
faq.a2: In most cases, yes. If your number isn't currently on WhatsApp Business API, we can migrate it. If it's on a personal WhatsApp account, we'll walk you through the migration process during onboarding.
faq.a3: Most agents are fully live within 3–5 business days. The onboarding session takes about 45–60 minutes, and we handle the rest behind the scenes.
faq.q4: Does it work with leads from ShowcaseIDX or my website?
faq.a4: Yes. Leads from ShowcaseIDX, your website, landing pages, or any source that triggers a WhatsApp message or web form submission will feed into the system. We configure the connections during setup.
faq.a5: No. WhachatCRM does not add any markup to messages. WhatsApp messaging fees are billed directly by Meta at their standard rates.
faq.a6: Absolutely. The Pro plan includes unlimited users. You can assign leads, share notes, and collaborate from a single unified inbox.

features.title: What the Growth Engine Does

f1.title: Responds instantly to every inquiry

f2.title: Qualifies buyers automatically
f2.desc: Identifies serious prospects based on budget, financing readiness, and timeline.

f3.title: Identifies serious prospects
f3.desc: Surfaces ready-to-close leads so you focus on who matters most.

f4.title: Sends your calendar when they want to book
f4.desc: Leads schedule their own showings directly into your availability.

f5.title: Follows up automatically if leads go quiet
f5.desc: Multi-day sequences keep warm leads engaged — on day 1, 3, and 7.

f6.title: Keeps everything organized in your CRM
f6.desc: Leads flow through your pipeline with scores and stage tags automatically.

howItWorks.title: How Your System Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From first message to booked showing — automatically.

s1.title: Lead sends a WhatsApp message
s1.desc: Inquiry arrives from a buyer or seller. Your system springs to life instantly.

s2.title: Instant automated response goes out
s2.desc: Lead gets a personalized greeting within seconds — no waiting on your end.

s3.title: AI qualifies the lead in real-time
s3.desc: Conversation is analyzed for budget, intent, and seriousness. Lead is scored automatically.

s4.title: Booking link is sent automatically
s4.desc: When they ask to schedule, your calendar opens directly in the chat.

s5.title: You get a handoff with context
s5.desc: Serious leads arrive in your CRM pre-qualified. Your time goes to high-probability deals.

s6.title: Cold leads are nurtured automatically
s6.desc: Leads who go quiet get follow-ups on day 1, 3, and 7. Nothing falls through the cracks.

solo.title: Solo agents who want 24/7 lead handling
solo.desc: Never miss a lead again. Your system works while you sleep, so every inquiry gets a fast, professional reply.

teams.title: Real estate teams managing high volumes of inquiries
teams.desc: Scale lead handling across your team without adding headcount. Every lead gets qualified and routed correctly.

ads.title: Agents running ads, listing campaigns, or online lead generation
ads.desc: Turn your ad spend into booked showings faster. Every inbound lead is handled the moment it arrives.

pricingPage.shopifyInstallBanner: You're connected through Shopify. Choose Starter ($19/mo) or Pro ($49/mo) below — checkout and subscription management run in Shopify. Each paid plan includes a 14-day free trial before the first charge. AI Brain is a separate add-on at $29/mo on top of your base plan.

hero.title: Simple, transparent pricing for growing conversations
hero.subtitle: Start free and upgrade when you're ready for more AI assistance, automation, and team capacity. No WhachatCRM markup on Meta conversation pricing.
hero.desc: Built for businesses that want one inbox, better follow-up, and smarter lead handling across messaging channels.

metaFees.title: No markup on Meta messaging fees
metaFees.body: WhachatCRM does not add per-message surcharges. Your subscription covers the platform, while Meta/WhatsApp conversation charges are billed separately according to Meta's pricing.
metaFees.note: Simple software pricing. No hidden messaging markup.

copilot.title: Copilot grows with your plan
copilot.subtitle: Starter includes AI Assist Basic. Pro includes AI Assist Enhanced. The optional AI Brain add-on adds deeper business memory, context assistance, and workflow intelligence.
copilot.starterDesc: Included with Starter for day-to-day help inside chats.
copilot.proDesc: Included with Pro for deeper inbox context and advanced AI assistance.
copilot.brainDesc: Optional add-on for Starter or Pro with deeper business memory, smarter suggestions, context assistance, insights, and advanced workflow intelligence.
copilot.brainF3: Advanced workflow and Growth Engine intelligence
copilot.note: AI Brain is optional on Starter or Pro. Some advanced AI workflow features depend on plan eligibility and enabled product areas.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.a1: Active conversations are contacts you interact with during your billing cycle — not individual messages.
faq.a2: No. You pay Meta/WhatsApp conversation fees directly based on Meta's pricing model. WhachatCRM does not add per-message markups.
faq.a3: Yes. You can move to a higher plan as your team, conversation volume, and automation needs grow.
faq.q4: What's the difference between Pro and AI Brain?
faq.a4: Pro unlocks unlimited users, 2,000 active conversations, advanced workflows, and Growth Engines access where eligible. AI Brain is an optional $29/mo intelligence layer for deeper business context, suggestions, insights, and AI workflow enhancements.
